goal: Style the board deck-switcher as a slim colourful pill (like the 'Save your fortune' chip)
fix: Added .mt-deck-switch pill styling in styles.css: ivory rounded pill, gold border, soft shadow, a gradient deck dot (::before), name inline-small, caret; hides the stacked 'FROM THE DECK' eyebrow inside the pill. Mirrors the daily streak chip's look so the two topbar corners are symmetric.
verified: chrome MCP daily.html @430 + @390: deck label renders as a 29px-tall pill with gradient dot + 'Moonmallow' + caret, top-left. md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
